2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

Jett McCullough #RS G

  • Position:
    Guard
  • Height:
    6-0
  • Weight:
    160
  • Class:
    Freshman
  • Hometown:
    Fairbanks, Alaska
  • Highschool:
    Monroe Catholic High School
  • Summary
  • Media

Summary

Biography

Season Personal-Bests: 
Games: 1 (2025-26)
Points: 6 (2025-26)
Rebounds: 2 (2025-26)
Assists: N/A
Steals: 3 (2025-26)
Blocks: N/A

Single Game Personal-Bests: 
Points: 6 (Dec. 13, 2025 vs. West Coast Baptist)
Rebounds: 2 (Dec. 13, 2025 vs. West Coast Baptist)
Assists: N/A
Steals: 3 (Dec. 13, 2025 vs. West Coast Baptist)
Blocks: N/A

2025-26 | Freshman
Appeared in one game during the 2025-26 season, scoring six points on 2-4 shooting vs. West Coast Baptist on Dec. 13, 2025 ... Went 1-2 from three and 1-2 from the free-throw line while adding two rebounds and three steals.

Prior to Alaska

Ketchikan High School
Attended and played basketball at Monroe Catholic High School in Fairbanks, where he eclipsed 1,000 points.

Personal
Son of Jason and Brandi McCullough ... Three siblings, Jase, Jalon and Ashley ... Brother Jalon played basketball at Alaska from 2017-2020 ... Majoring in Engineering.
